findings.explanation: Missing allowed-tools. Skill needs Bash, Read, Write, Edit, WebFetch (for SDK docs). Scripts use Anthropic API and connect to MCP servers. Without restriction, unlimited access.

findings.content: from anthropic import Anthropic; client = Anthropic()
findings.explanation: Uses Anthropic API client which implicitly reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from environment. Legitimate for MCP server evaluation purpose. No credential exfiltration — sends evaluation prompts to Anthropic API.
Connects to arbitrary URLs for MCP server testing. Core purpose of the skill. URLs are user-provided via CLI args, not hardcoded.

findings.content: WebFetch to load SDK docs from GitHub URLs
findings.explanation: Instructs fetching from github.com and modelcontextprotocol.io. Legitimate documentation sources. URLs are well-known, verified repos.
